'''sahaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabuliat|kabuliat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabuliat|kabuliat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sahaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæhæyæth|sæhæyæth]] || [[word:sæhæyæj|sæhæyæj]] || [[word:sæhæyæsh|sæhæyæsh]] || [[word:sæhæyæ|sæhæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sahahayath|sahahayath]] || [[word:sahahayaj|sahahayaj]] || [[word:sahahayash|sahahayash]] || [[word:sahahaya|sahahaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sahayath|sahayath]] || [[word:sahayaj|sahayaj]] || [[word:sahayash|sahayash]] || [[word:sahaya|sahaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sahafyath|sahafyath]] || [[word:sahafyaj|sahafyaj]] || [[word:sahafyash|sahafyash]] || [[word:sahafyaf|sahafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sahayatha|sahayatha]] || [[word:sahayaja|sahayaja]] || [[word:sahayasha|sahayasha]] || [[word:sahayaka|sahayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sahayath|sahayath]] || [[word:sahayaj|sahayaj]] || [[word:sahayash|sahayash]] || [[word:sahaya|sahaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sahayathal|sahayathal]] || [[word:sahayajal|sahayajal]] || [[word:sahayashal|sahayashal]] || [[word:sahayakal|sahayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sahayathatha|sahayathatha]] || [[word:sahayajaja|sahayajaja]] || [[word:sahayashasha|sahayashasha]] || [[word:sahayaka|sahayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sahayathan|sahayathan]] || [[word:sahayajan|sahayajan]] || [[word:sahayashan|sahayashan]] || [[word:sahayakan|sahayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sahayathaoro|sahayathaoro]] || [[word:sahayajaoro|sahayajaoro]] || [[word:sahayashaoro|sahayashaoro]] || [[word:sahayakaoro|sahayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
